description_long: This is a tall, stone monument with a cross at the top, mounted on a multi-tiered rectangular base. The front face features a heart-shaped plaque with engraved text, and the monument is constructed from light gray stone, showing signs of weathering and age. The structure is composed of several stacked rectangular blocks, each slightly smaller than the one below, creating a stepped appearance. The base is set on a square stone platform, which is surrounded by a slightly raised border. The cross at the top is simple and unadorned, while the heart-shaped plaque adds a decorative and commemorative element. The overall design is solemn and typical of memorials or grave markers found in urban cemeteries or parks.
description: A tall, gray stone monument with a cross on top, heart-shaped plaque, and stepped rectangular base, set on a square platform. The structure is weathered and commemorative, typical of urban memorials.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cross, heart-shaped plaque with inscription, and the stepped base.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the monument's depth and the layered structure of the base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back of the monument and the full height of the cross.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting the monument's profile and the square platform.
attribute_inscription: There is an engraved inscription on the heart-shaped plaque on the front face, in a serif font and likely in English, but the text is not fully legible from the images.
attribute_ornamentation: The only ornamentation is the heart-shaped plaque beneath the cross; otherwise, the monument is plain and unadorned.
attribute_base_design: The base consists of several stacked rectangular stone blocks, each tier slightly smaller than the one below, forming a stepped structure. The lowest tier sits on a square stone platform with a slightly raised border.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is a simple, upright cross with no additional decoration, made from the same stone as the rest of the monument.
attribute_surrounding_features: The obelisk is set on a square stone platform with a slightly raised border; no other surrounding features are visible.
